_comment: Reference manifest. Copy to your project as dashboard.config.json and remove this field.
title: Engagement metric validation, Q2 2026 cohort review
narrative_arc: We introduced a new engagement_score metric derived from three dbt models. This dashboard validates its distribution, stability across cohorts, and 30-day trend to confirm the metric is production-ready.

charts.title: Distribution of engagement_score
charts.description: Histogram of engagement_score across all 10,000 users in the Q2 cohort. A roughly normal distribution centered near 50 confirms the metric is not saturated.

charts.title: Mean score by cohort
charts.description: Bar chart comparing mean engagement_score across the four cohorts (Control, Treatment A, Treatment B, Treatment C). Cohorts should not differ by more than 5 points if random assignment held.

data_source.query: SELECT cohort, ROUND(AVG(engagement_score), 2) AS mean_score FROM 'data/engagement.parquet' GROUP BY cohort ORDER BY cohort

charts.title: Daily mean engagement_score, last 30 days
charts.description: Line chart of daily mean score over the observation window. A stable or slightly increasing trend is expected; a sharp drop on any single day warrants investigation.

data_source.query: SELECT event_date, ROUND(AVG(engagement_score), 3) AS mean_score FROM 'data/engagement.parquet' GROUP BY event_date ORDER BY event_date
